name: Scrambled Eggs with Fresh Oysters and Chiles
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon minced fresh red chile pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the flour with salt and pepper.
2. Dredge the oysters in the seasoned flour mixture.
3. Shake off any excess flour from the oysters.
4. Heat olive oil and sesame oil in a deep sauté pan until hot.
5. Add the oysters to the pan and fry on both sides for 2-3 minutes, or until cooked through.
6. Remove the fried oysters and drain them on paper towels.
7. Set aside the fried oysters.
8. In the same sauté pan, add ginger, green onion, and chile pepper to the hot oil.
9. Stir and cook for 1 minute.
10. Meanwhile, stir the soy sauce into the lightly beaten eggs.
11. Add the egg mixture to the sauté pan and scramble until they reach your desired doneness.
12. Transfer the scrambled eggs to a serving plate and top with the fried oysters.
13. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
